intro: Chrysanthellum leschenaultii, also known as Chrysanthemum lessertii, is a flowering plant species native to the Indian subcontinent, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine properties, which help in relieving symptoms of allergies, fever, and skin conditions. Bioactive constituents of Chrysanthellum leschenaultii include flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
